content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Strong post-election rally with Nifty +0.95%, Bank Nifty +0.96%, Auto +1.54%, Realty +2.00%, Pharma +1.13%. VIX cooling to 18.05. Broad-based participation. Existing book benefiting from rally with multiple positions in profit. Focus is risk-management on winners, not chasing breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +7%, strong Q4 print (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA improved to 0.93%, AUM +13%). Trail SL slightly to 1040 (stays below 1045.50 intraday low, above prior trail of 1035.27, ~1.2% below CMP — comfortable gap). Target intact at 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.7%, gold consolidating after recent dip. SL 119 (~3.2% below CMP) is reasonable macro-hedge buffer. Geopolitical tail still alive. Hold as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1801.24,
      "new_target": 1880.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +5.7% at CMP 1835, near 52w high 1851.20. Existing SL 1801.24 is already locked above entry (1734) — keeping it to avoid micro-adjust violation. Q4 results May 19 — binary event ahead; will reassess closer. Note: not modifying since stored SL is intact and tight enough; emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.7% at 484.50, just touched 52w high 485.70. SL 475 is ~2% below CMP, sits at breakeven+. Apr production -9.7% YoY is a medium-term concern but Q4 print was strong (+11.4% PAT). Keep SL — don't tighten too aggressively into resistance test."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "new_target": 220.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.1% at 206.90, blew through 52w high 204.44 on 8.2x volume — institutional conviction. Original target 212 nearly hit. Trail SL up to 204 (just below the prior 52w high which is now support, ~1.4% below CMP). Raise target to 220 — momentum justifies. R:R from here: risk ~3 vs reward ~13."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 165,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.5% at 294.80, nearing SL 296. Today's intraday action is weak (-2.19%) on 1.3x volume after yesterday's +5.4% spike — bearish reversal. Stock breaking VWAP (296.81) and below pivot (296.57). Q4 not until May 21 — extended event window. Cut now ahead of SL trigger to preserve capital and avoid slippage on stop-out. Crude reversal post-Mideast de-escalation undermines thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.9% at 24.09. SL 23.55 is ~2.3% below CMP, fine. Pharma sector +1.13% today. US tariff overhang persists but generics likely exempt. Hold as sector exposure."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 938.00,
      "new_target": 985.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.1% at 954.55, moving up post Q4 (PAT +22%). Trail SL from 928 to 938 (~1.7% below CMP, locks closer to breakeven). Above-0.5% adjustment, monotonic-up. Target 985 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.4% at 1705. Strong Q4 (revenue +27%, PAT +9.4%), printed new 52w high 1723 today. SL 1655 is ~3% below CMP, fine. Let it run; monitor for breakout consolidation above 1700."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.7% at 1538. Today shooting-star type action (high 1600, close 1538) on 4.2x volume after huge prior rally — profit-taking, not thesis break. Q4 results May 14 binary event ~7 sessions away. SL 1490 is ~3.1% below CMP, adequate. Will reassess closer to May 14 per binary-event discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 4,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 13800.00,
      "stop_loss": 13400.00,
      "target": 14500.00,
      "confidence": 0.66,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Auto sector leader, +4.26% on 1.3x volume. April record sales 239,646 units (~42% market share), Q4 revenue +28%, exports +61.3% YoY. GST cut tailwind on autos. Breakout above 20-DMA cluster. Entry 13800 (slight pullback from CMP 13822), SL 13400 (-2.9%), target 14500 (+5.1%). R:R = 700/400 = 1.75. Position size: 4 shares × 13800 = ₹55,200 (~5.5% of portfolio). Risk = ₹1,600 (0.16% of portfolio) — within budget. ONGC exit frees capital; rotating into better setup."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1035.27 to 1040 — locks more gain, leaves room above intraday low 1045.50."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge; SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1801 already above entry 1734 — gain locked. Q4 May 19 binary; will reassess at T-3."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 475 above entry 469 — breakeven+ locked. Testing 52w high; don't over-tighten."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail from 207.78 to 204 — wait, 204 < 207.78 would be loosening. Keeping stored SL 207.78 as trail floor. Cancel modify; HOLD."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Cut early — weak intraday tape, near SL, crude reversal undermines thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Sector exposure; SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 938.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 928 to 938 — closer to breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Breakout to new 52w high; let it run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 14 binary event — will reassess T-3."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BAJAJ-AUTO: gap-up +8.58% with shooting-star intraday, board meeting May 6 (Q4 + buyback + dividend) is a triple binary event in 2 sessions — too close for fresh entry per binary-event discipline. Watch post-event. BHEL: results today, P/E 224, analyst PT range 115-393 = wide disagreement, avoid binary chase. SYNGENE: 15-20% squeeze on Apr 30 then -42% trailing 12M context, CEO transition + FDA overhang — pass. ADANIPORTS held already, no add. KOTAKBANK: not enough conviction on dip-buy yet.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book deployed 51% with 10 positions across financials, energy, pharma, metals, auto, ports, gold — well diversified. Today's rally producing winners across the book; priority is locking gains via trail SLs, not chasing new highs. ONGC exit eliminates the only meaningful loser. Adding MARUTI (auto cluster: only 1 new position, no current auto exposure — within cluster discipline). After ONGC exit and MARUTI entry: deployed ~52%, cash ~48% — comfortable buffer. Watch SUNPHARMA (May 19) and GESHIP (May 14) Q4 binaries — pre-event risk-trim actions due in coming sessions."
}
